content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Accepted the amendment because it identifies a real force-complete reconciliation bug with an appropriate narrow fix and regression target.

## Votes

- `fr-1-694a9a09`: Accept
  The code currently reconciles covered_by_existing_bead findings before force_completed findings are filtered, so a force-completed final-review aggregate can still post and flush a br comment to the referenced bead. That contradicts the force-complete behavior that defers accepted amendments to the journal, with only propose_new_bead follow-up creation handled specially. Filtering force_completed findings from covered-by-existing reconciliation and adding a mixed-classification regression is correct and improves safety by preventing unintended bead mutation.
